⊕ Lagna Interpretation
Taurus Lagna with Venus in 3rd house. The native possesses remarkable aesthetic sensibility and material acumen. Moon in Gemini 2nd house bestows eloquence and financial intelligence. Jupiter's aspect on Lagna from 9th house confers divine grace and philosophical temperament.
